upgrade.outcomeDesc: Ang mga estudyanteng nakakatapos ng 500+ na mga tanong sa pagsasanay ay makabuluhang nagpapabuti sa posibilidad na pumasa. Ang NurseNest Pro ay nagbibigay sa iyo ng 13,000+ na mga tanong na nakaayon sa pagsusulit na may detalyadong mga paliwanag upang makabuo ka ng mga kasanayan sa klinikal na paghatol na sinusubok sa NCLEX-RN, NCLEX-PN, at REx-PN.

paywall.dashboard.lose0: Pinagsamang readiness at suggested next steps sa mga session
paywall.dashboard.lose2: Weak-area flashcard at drill nudges mula sa mga mali mo
paywall.dashboard.progress: May aktibidad ka na sa account na ito. Mag-upgrade para gawing daily hub ito na may naka-save na signals, hindi banner lang.
paywall.dashboard.title: I-unlock ang buong access
paywall.exams.intro: Ang mga timed practice exam ay nagmumula sa server-side pool ng tier mo. Sa checkout, puwede ang buong haba ng attempts, autosave, at score history.
paywall.exams.lose0: Buong-habang timed sessions na may attempt review
paywall.exams.lose1: Score history at pacing na tumutugma sa authorization-to-test timing
paywall.exams.lose2: Mga naka-save na pagsasanay na pagsusulit na nakatali sa pathway mo
paywall.exams.progress: Kapag aktibo ang plano mo, lalabas agad dito ang mga bagong pagsasanay na pagsusulit pagkatapos ng checkout.
paywall.exams.title: I-unlock ang buong access
paywall.passPromise.heading: Will this help me pass?
paywall.passPromise.lead: You earn the pass—NurseNest trains what regulators test: prioritization, safety, and scope under time. Items include full teaching rationales (not answer keys). Upgrading adds the full scoped bank, weak-area routing, and saved history so you close gaps before test day.
paywall.safeToTryLine: Safe to try first: previews and caps are there so you can judge item quality and rationales before any paid plan.
paywall.preview.bankSizeLine: Live question bank: {{count}}+ items (updates as we publish).
paywall.preview.contentFreshness: No bait-and-switch: this block uses the same stem, choices, and rationale pattern as the public homepage sample. A paid plan unlocks the full bank for your track, that rationale depth at scale, and cross-device review history.
paywall.preview.heading: Same item you previewed on the homepage—now in your practice flow
paywall.preview.lead: Exam-style stem, four options, then the teaching rationale you already saw: pathophysiology for the right move and a clear takedown of the trap option—subscribers get that depth on every item across the full bank.
paywall.preview.proofIntro: What’s in the library right now
paywall.preview.neutralProofBody: We couldn’t load live counts just now—your connection or our servers may be busy. Premium still unlocks the full pathway-scoped bank, lessons, and rationales; see Pricing for current plans.
paywall.preview.qualitativeProofBody: Counts vary by pathway and how often we publish. Premium gives you the full scoped question bank, complete lessons, and teaching rationales for your license—the preview below shows the same item quality subscribers use.
paywall.preview.rationaleDepthHint: Every teaching rationale states the correct action with pathophysiology, then dismantles distractors in priority order—same depth as this sample.
paywall.objections.title: Straight answers
paywall.objections.proofWithCount: Same build quality as paid items: exam-style stem, four choices, full teach-through on correct and incorrect options. The pathway bank lists {{count}}+ questions and growing—subscription unlocks the entire scoped pool and your saved review trail.
paywall.objections.proofNoCount: Same build quality as paid items: exam-style stem, four choices, full teach-through on correct and incorrect options. Subscription unlocks the full pathway-scoped bank and your saved review trail—no slimmed-down shadow product.
paywall.objections.proofNeutral: Same build quality as paid items: exam-style stem, four choices, full teach-through on every option. Subscription unlocks the full pathway bank and saved review history—live counts for your pathway appear here when the library snapshot loads.
paywall.objections.worthIt.a: If you are serious about the attempt, yes: subscription removes preview caps and unlocks the full bank, full lesson depth, timed exam modes, and cross-device history for your tier—everything you previewed at production scale, without a different product behind the paywall.
paywall.objections.different.a: Passive studying and generic banks do not train licensure judgment under time pressure. NurseNest is built for active, exam-style reps: pathway-scoped items with teaching rationales—not one-line keys—and readiness signals tied to your license so your next block targets weak areas instead of a random queue.
paywall.objections.otherPrep.q: Is this better than UWorld or Archer?
paywall.objections.otherPrep.a: Those platforms are widely trusted for high-volume practice—we are not here to run them down. NurseNest is built as one pathway-aligned workspace: exam-style items with teaching rationales on every option, structured lessons, and readiness signals that steer the next block toward reasoning gaps—so the through-line is clinical judgment under your license scope, not item count alone. Many students pair NurseNest with another bank; use whatever stack you trust.
paywall.objections.afterPay.a: Checkout completes on Stripe; when payment succeeds, your tier unlocks on our servers in the same session—refresh the page if you still see preview caps. You land back in NurseNest with full bank and lesson access for your subscription, timed modes where your plan includes them, and your existing progress on your account. Your next step is the study hub: start a block or resume where you left off—no separate app, no waiting period.
paywall.objections.passExam.q: Will this actually help me pass?
paywall.objections.passExam.a: You still earn the pass with your own study hours—nothing replaces that. NurseNest makes those hours higher-yield: exam-style prioritization and elimination thinking, option-level rationales on every choice, and analytics that route the next session to your weakest topics until they are solid.
paywall.objections.ifStayFree.q: What do I lose if I don't upgrade?
paywall.objections.ifStayFree.a: You stay under the cap: limited reps before practice stops, weaker readiness than unlimited blocks with full rationale depth, and no persistent analytics loop that carries weak-area data into your next session. You keep previews; you lose volume, depth, and the feedback system that converts practice into confidence.
paywall.objections.upToDate.a: Items are written and refreshed for current US and Canadian licensure decision standards. They are original teaching items—not leaked exam content—and they track today’s clinical and safety expectations so your practice mirrors what boards test now.
paywall.footerHint: Karamihan sa mga handa na sa exam ay naghalo ng steady na practice questions, buong rationales, at kahit isang buong pagsasanay na pagsusulit sa mga linggo bago ang petsa — hindi isang bagsakan lang.
paywall.lessons.intro: Ang lesson previews ay nagpapakita ng istruktura; ang mga subscriber ay nakakakuha ng buong body, module progress, at lesson pool na tumutugma sa pathway mo.
paywall.lessons.lose0: Buong lesson content lampas sa preview limits
paywall.lessons.lose1: Completion tracking at resume sa mga module
paywall.lessons.lose2: Cross-lesson sequences na naka-align sa scope ng exam mo
paywall.lessons.progress: Ang mga preview modules na binuksan mo ay bilang pa rin sa study story mo. Mag-upgrade para mapanatili ang progreso at lalim.
paywall.lessons.title: I-unlock ang buong access
paywall.questions.intro: Ang preview at may limit na runs ay nagpapakita ng interface; ang paid tier ay nag-u-unlock ng pathway-scoped pool, buong rationales sa bawat opsyon, weak-area routing, at cross-device history.
paywall.questions.lose0: Buong rationales at review history para sa bawat item na nasubukan mo
paywall.questions.lose1: Unlimited o tier-scoped bank access (hindi preview caps)
paywall.questions.lose2: Category analytics na nananatili sa session at device
paywall.questions.progress: Nagsimula ka na. Bilang ang mga kamakailang attempt mo. Mag-upgrade para mapanatili ang weak-topic lists, streaks, at buong review sa halip na mawala ang lalim pagkatapos ng bawat preview.
paywall.questions.title: I-unlock ang buong access
paywall.ctaDecisionLine: If this preview matches how you want to prepare, the next step is straightforward: compare plans when you are ready. Pricing lays out each tier in plain language—no surprise steps.
paywall.preCta.microLine1: You’re building exam judgment on purpose—not guessing your way through the bank.
paywall.preCta.microLine2: Plans and access are spelled out on Pricing; your progress stays in one account—no hidden layers.
paywall.preCta.microLine3: When you’re ready, choose a plan and step straight back into practice.
paywall.sampleExploreLead: Browse sample marketing pages for your track (same item style as the app):

paywall.tierLine.NP: NP track: advanced-practice items and lessons aligned to your focus area.

paywall.tierLine.RPN: RPN track: Canadian practical nursing practice scoped to your registration pathway.
